summary: 1 clause change(s) detected affecting internal policy and product catalog.

changes.old_text: The testing will be conducted in a staging environment that mirrors production, using the latest stable build.
changes.new_text: The testing must be conducted in a staging environment that mirrors production, using the latest stable build and is subject to regular security audits.
changes.amendment: 2.1. Testing shall be conducted in a staging environment that mirrors production, utilizing the latest stable build, and subject to regular security audits.
